Title: Mulan
Writer: Rick Jaffa, Amanda Silver, Lauren Hynek
Actors: Yifei Liu, Donnie Yen, Gong Li
Plot: To keep her ailing father from serving in the Imperial Army, a fearless young woman disguises herself as a man and battles northern invaders in China.
Awards: Nominated for 2 Oscars. 12 wins & 43 nominations total
